refactorings_applied: DRY: Extracted isWithinRoot() helper in path-validator.ts to eliminate 3x repeated boundary-check pattern (startsWith(root + sep) || === root) in resolveAndValidateRealPath()

DRY: Extracted checkPathSafety() helper in file-operations.ts to consolidate 5x repeated isPathSafe + resolveAndValidateRealPath dual-check pattern across readFileContent, updateFileContent, createFileOrDirectory, deleteFileOrDirectory, writeBinaryFile
DRY: Updated validateFileOperation() to use checkPathSafety() for consistency
DRY: Created shared symlink test fixtures (tests/helpers/symlink-test-fixtures.ts) to deduplicate beforeEach/afterEach setup across path-validator.test.ts and file-operations-symlink.test.ts

JSDoc: Added [SEC-394] tags to all 7 modified function JSDoc comments (readFileContent, updateFileContent, createFileOrDirectory, deleteFileOrDirectory, writeBinaryFile, validateFileOperation, checkPathSafety)
SRP: isWithinRoot() has a single responsibility (pure string boundary comparison), exported with @internal tag
Test: Added 4 unit tests for isWithinRoot() including prefix-matching edge case
commits: 824c9b8: refactor(path-validator): improve DRY compliance and code quality for Issue #394
message: Refactoring completed. Eliminated DRY violations in path-validator.ts (3x boundary check) and file-operations.ts (5x dual-check pattern). Added shared test fixtures and 4 new isWithinRoot() tests. All 4328 tests pass, 0 static analysis errors.
